title: Resident Evil 4 Mod
description: A Minecraft mod about the Resident Evil 4 Remake. The mod adds things such as: Blacktail, Chicago Sweeper,  SG-09R,and new friends or foes?
body:
# Pigifyer Presents: Resident Evil 4 Remake Mod
- A Mod that is Based off Resident Evil 4 Remake, this mod adds thing such as the SG-09, the W-870, the Stingray, heck even the Merchant! Theres some bosses, like Krauser. Enemies as the Ganado, Zealot, and Soldier but those will be added in a later version. Also we have the Blacktail, the Red9 also with the stock, new biome: Resident Evil Pines, and Striker! Also Download these Item frame resource packs to make them fit better with the vibe. [Invisible Item Frame](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/invisible-item-frame), and
[Enhanced Item Frame](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-item-frame)

### Features
- Adds Guns to the game from RE4 "remake".
- Adds Mobs from RE4 "remake".
- Adds biomes specifically from RE4 "remake".
- Adds structures from RE4 "remake".
- Adds items from RE4 "remake".

   That's it so far.
